login.title: Sign in
login.description: Use your account credentials to access the app.
login.verifyEmailToast: Check your inbox to confirm your email. You can resend the message from this page if needed.

errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Create a customer account to access the app. Password: at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol.
signup.resendConfirmationLink: Didn't get the email? Resend confirmation
signup.verifyEmailToast: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Verify it when you can—you can resend from the sign-in page.

errors.allRequired: Email, password and confirm password are required.
errors.invalidEmail: Please provide a valid email address.
errors.passwordMismatch: Password and confirm password must match.
errors.passwordPolicy: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a lowercase letter, an uppercase letter, a number, and a symbol.

businessRegister.title: Register your business
businessRegister.description: Create a tenant account. Password: at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol. Fields match the API requirements.

errors.requiredFields: Trade name, legal name, email, password, phone, tax number, subscription, currency, and full address (country, state, city, street, building number, post code) are required.
errors.passwordMismatch: Password and confirm password must match.
errors.passwordPolicy: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a lowercase letter, an uppercase letter, a number, and a symbol.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter the email you use to sign in. If an account exists, we will send reset instructions.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists for this email, you will receive password reset instructions shortly.

errors.invalidEmail: Please provide a valid email address.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password. Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can sign in with your new password.

errors.missingToken: This link is missing a reset token. Open the link from your email or request a new reset.
errors.passwordPolicy: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a lowercase letter, an uppercase letter, a number, and a symbol.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm your email
confirmEmail.description: Verify the email address for your account.
confirmEmail.prompt: Click the button below to confirm your email address.

errors.missingToken: This link is missing a confirmation token. Open the link from your email or request a new confirmation email.

requestEmailConfirmation.title: Resend confirmation email
requestEmailConfirmation.description: Enter the email you used to register. If the account needs verification, we will send a new link.
requestEmailConfirmation.successMessage: If this account needs email verification, you will receive a message shortly.

errors.invalidEmail: Please provide a valid email address.
